measurementNote: Project-switch timings include Computer Use action and accessibility-tree refresh overhead; they are conservative upper-bound observations, not low-level event timings.

terminalLoad.details: A packaged shell rendered seq 1 4000. Two additional shells then emitted 2000 delayed lines each with overlapping execution.

multiPane.details: The active project reached four panes for the recorded performance sample and five panes after Gemini launch.

geminiTui.details: Gemini started in a packaged pane and rendered its folder-trust prompt. No trust choice or prompt was submitted.

oneProjectEditAgentPreview.gap: The complete edit + agent prompt + detected browser preview workflow still needs a timed packaged run.

twoAgentSameProject.details: Structured Codex chats preserve independent provider runs. Optional raw terminals also passed packaged isolation: pre-relaunch PIDs 59144/62755, post-relaunch PIDs 84110/89143, independent labels/output, and switch-back without restart.
